raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> my wallet was stolen and my card was used without my authorization for the amount of {$2200.00} my wallet was found in an alley way and someone returned it to me I disputed the charge made on my account and Citibank said I was responsible for the charges I told them I never made the charges that my wallet was stolen they opened a fraudulent charges complaint and issued a new card then they decided I was responsible for the charges I never made they allowed an unauthorized person to make an {$2200.00} purchase with my card
